mapper.select: SELECT emp.employeeName FROM ems.employee emp WHERE emp.position = 0 ORDER BY emp.employeeName
SELECT DISTINCT expensesType, expensesTypeName FROM ems.m_expenses WHERE deleteFlg = '0' ORDER BY expensesType

SELECT e.expensesID, e.accrualDate, e.cost, e.tantouName, e.settlementType, e.settlementDate, e.expensesType, e.happenAddress, e.deleteFlg, e.receiptPath, e.m_expenses_id as mexpensesId, e.insertDate, e.updateDate, m.expensesTypeName, m.expenseName as expenseNameText FROM ems.expenses e LEFT JOIN ems.m_expenses m ON e.m_expenses_id = m.id WHERE e.expensesID = #{expensesID} AND e.deleteFlg = '0'
mapper.update: UPDATE ems.expenses SET accrualDate = #{accrualDate}, cost = #{cost}, tantouName = #{tantouName}, settlementType= #{settlementType}, settlementDate= #{settlementDate}, expensesType = #{expensesType}, happenAddress = #{happenAddress}, receiptPath = #{receiptPath}, m_expenses_id = #{mexpensesId}, updateDate = #{updateDate} WHERE expensesID = #{expensesID} AND deleteFlg = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ems.expenses ( expensesID, accrualDate, cost, tantouName, settlementType, settlementDate, expensesType, happenAddress, deleteFlg, receiptPath, m_expenses_id, insertDate, updateDate ) VALUES ( #{expensesID}, #{accrualDate}, #{cost}, #{tantouName}, #{settlementType}, #{settlementDate}, #{expensesType}, #{happenAddress}, '0', #{receiptPath}, #{mexpensesId}, #{insertDate}, #{updateDate} )
